description: Code review checklist verifier: scores 0.5*F1(detection) + 0.5*fix_score. Detection compares reported defects in review.json against expected_defects.json by file path matching. Fix scoring checks 4 code patterns in workspace files: (1) DisplayAttribute before DisplayNameAttribute in ExpressionMemberAccessor.cs, (2) For null check with exception in DisplayName.cs, (3) _displayNameCache.Clear() in ClearCache, (4) _previousFieldAccessor equality comparison in DisplayName.cs.

perfect_input.review.json: Placed at /workspace/review.json. Lists all 4 expected defects with matching file paths for perfect detection F1.
perfect_input.ExpressionMemberAccessor.cs: Placed at src/Components/Web/src/Forms/ExpressionMemberAccessor.cs in workspace. Contains GetCustomAttribute<DisplayAttribute> before GetCustomAttribute<DisplayNameAttribute> (defect-1 fix) and _displayNameCache.Clear() (defect-3 fix).
perfect_input.DisplayName.cs: Placed at src/Components/Web/src/Forms/DisplayName.cs in workspace. Contains For is null + InvalidOperationException (defect-2 fix) and _previousFieldAccessor != comparison (defect-4 fix).

empty_input.review.json: Empty file. No defects reported, no code changes. Detection F1 = 0.0, fix score = 0.0.

scoring_notes.perfect: Detection: 4 TP, 4 reported, 4 expected -> precision=1.0, recall=1.0, F1=1.0. Fix: 4/4 patterns match -> fix_score=1.0. Final: 0.5*1.0 + 0.5*1.0 = 1.0. NOTE: fix scoring reads from workspace paths, so fixture .cs files must be placed at the correct workspace paths for fix checks to pass.
scoring_notes.empty: Empty review.json fails JSON parse -> reported=[]. Detection F1=0.0. No code changes -> fix_score=0.0. Final: 0.0.
